Order.cancelled: Payment was cancelled. You can fill in the form again.
Order.footnote: The full car analysis is prepared and sent to your email within 24 hours.
Order.emailHint: We’ll send the report to this address.
Order.phoneHint: Backup contact, e.g. if the email was mistyped.
Order.summaryNote: One-off payment for full VIN and listing analysis.
Order.stripeNote: Secure payment via Stripe; cards and Apple/Google Pay on supported devices.

validation.vin: Enter a valid VIN (11–17 characters, without I, O, Q).
validation.listing: Enter a valid listing URL (http or https).
validation.phone: Enter a phone number (for contact after payment).
